title: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee.
body_text: You are a structured-output adapter for Cognee. Return ONLY one valid JSON object. No markdown fences, no commentary. The JSON MUST validate against this Pydantic JSON Schema for Smoke: { "properties": { "ok": { "title": "Ok", "type": "boolean" }, "tool": { "title": "Tool", "type": "string" } }, "required": [ "ok", "tool" ], "title": "Smoke", "type": "object" } System instructions from Cognee: You are a JSON smoke test. Input text: Return ok true and tool codex_oauth. {"ok":true,"tool":"codex_oauth"}
